WHAT I BUILD

BUILT FROM THE MESS

Websites, app-style builds, and systems for ideas that need a real shape, a clear flow, and somewhere to actually live.

WEBSITES

For the thing in your head that needs screens, buttons, forms, and a real flow before it can move forward.

SEE WEBSITE WORK →

APP BUILDS

For the idea that needs screens, forms, buttons, and a flow people can actually click through.

SEE APP BUILDS →

SYSTEMS

For the idea, business, program, or project that needs a real home online, not just a pretty page with words.

SEE SYSTEMS →

THE PART BETWEEN IDEA AND BUILD

Messy idea first. Clean build second.

You do not need the perfect plan before you start. Bring the screenshots, notes, half-built pages, and “can it work like this?” ideas. I help sort it out and build the version that actually makes sense.

_ww-text_text.en:
The rough notes, screenshots, half-built pages, and “I need it to work like this” ideas — that is where I like to start.

I take the scattered pieces and turn them into something clear, usable, and ready to show.

© 2026 Maggie Dukek.
Built with too many ideas and just enough structure.
BRING THE MESS. I’LL BUILD THE FLOW.
